calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Judith Baer for Sally A. Ruf.

The Court inquired whether Ms. Baer had seen the Probate Examiner's notes. Ms. Baer stated that she filed a supplemental declaration in response to the Examiner's notes on 1/27/19 and that due to the Probate Examiner's unavailability the matter was continued. Ms. Baer addressed the order stating that attachment 7a asks that the 50% share of the subject real property be confirmed to her client as sole trustee of her living trust and that her declaration filed on 1/27/19 supports the request. Ms. Baer provided a brief background stating that twenty-five years ago her client put her 50% interest of the real property in a trust, that it is a revocable Trust, and that her client is the settlor. Ms. Baer also stated that they would have to take the 50% interest in the real property out of the trust, that they would then have to confirm it to Ms. Baer, that it would then be put it back in the trust, and that they are trying to avoid these additional steps. Brief additional argument is held. The Court and counsel confer regarding attachments 5a & 7a to the proposed order. Ms. Baer stated that the decendant's half will pass to the surviving spouse and then the half her client owns is then confirmed to her. Ms. Baer stated that the form calls for the language and that she's done lots of these petitions. At the conclusion of discussions/argument, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy K. Chan. Matter not reported.
